features.evidence: 2026-07-20 CDT: Current verified cross-VM state is the selected current-release auth profile 146 rows (146 pass / 0 open) and overall parity 258 rows (257 pass / 0 open / 1 not applicable). All selected current-release auth rows are closed. There are 49 explicit current-release scope exclusions: 25 Arc/Safari paths, four generic Opera GX Ubuntu paths, 10 Windows Chrome/Edge paths that Zero supports but pinned notebooklm-py==0.7.2 / rookiepy==0.5.6 cannot execute, and 10 macOS Chromium/Vivaldi cookie paths classified deferred_to_future_release. Exclusions are never passes or N/A; the 10 deferred paths are not technical-incompatibility classifications. Historical snapshots remain labeled historical. Universal exact 1:1 and production claims remain false; the public alpha is limited to this selected profile.
features.notes: Selected current-release auth closure is complete: 146 rows pass and none is open. The 49 explicit exclusions are never passes or N/A; 10 macOS Chromium/Vivaldi cookie paths are deferred_to_future_release current-release scope exclusions, not technical-incompatibility classifications. This supports the bounded public alpha but not universal exact 1:1, production, security-audit, or MCP claims.

rules: Keep exactly one implementation feature active unless the repository owner explicitly authorizes parallel lanes.
Do not mark a feature pass without verification evidence.
Update this file and any local ledger when the active task, evidence, or blocker changes.
Treat worker self-report as candidate evidence until an independent reviewer or maintainer verifies it.

status_legend.pass: Verified enough for the current ledger claim; keep evidence current.
status_legend.pending: Not active or awaiting explicit authorization/evidence.
